name: luistoledo-academy
description: Scripts de desarrollo para Luis Toledo Academy

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names frontend,backend --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start:dev --prefix backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix backend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix frontend && npm run test --prefix backend -- --runInBand
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && npm run db:generate && npm run db:deploy && npm run db:seed
